trinkets.tooltip.attributes.single: When equipped in the %d trinket slot:
config.trinkets.render_first_person_hand: Toggles visibility of trinkets in first person hand.
config.trinkets.show_slots_indicator.des: Toggles visibility of the indicator for slots that aren't currently shown and require you to hover over other slots.
config.trinkets.show_slot_tooltip.desc: Toggles visibility of a tooltip when hovering over trinket slots.
config.trinkets.sidebar_slots.desc: Forces all trinkets slots into being placed in a sidebar, rather than being attached to equipment slots.
config.trinkets.sidebar_heigth.desc: Controls maximum height sidebar-placed slots can take before moving to a next column.
config.trinkets.show_item_tooltip.desc: Toggles visibility of a tooltip indicating slot an item can be put in.
